parameters: Yep! That little brat, making us run around when we're already so busy!
Let's hurry back! We need to prepare the border defenses!
Demons have it hard too, huh?
Hmm... I don't quite know why they want me, but they might do
something horrible to me if I don't go. Guess I have no choice.
